content:
# Overall Project Summary (Apr 18, 2026)

Development on April 18 focused heavily on infrastructure maintenance, with a comprehensive series of dependency updates across the core framework and a new proposal for agent-to-agent commerce integration. Additionally, the plugin ecosystem expanded with a submission for a new quantitative oracle integration.

## ✅ Completed Work

**Dependency Management and Infrastructure**
*   Maintained project stability by updating core dependencies, including Supabase/Postgres, Capacitor monorepo, Uniswap SDKs, Node types, and Rust wasm-bindgen ([elizaos/eliza#6959](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6959), [elizaos/eliza#6957](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6957), [elizaos/eliza#6956](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6956), [elizaos/eliza#6955](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6955), [elizaos/eliza#6954](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6954), [elizaos/eliza#6953](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6953), [elizaos/eliza#6952](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6952), [elizaos/eliza#6951](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6951), [elizaos/eliza#6949](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6949)).
*   Updated core libraries to ensure compatibility, including `@coral-xyz/borsh` and `@elizaos/core` ([elizaos/eliza#6958](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6958), [elizaos/eliza#6950](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6950)).

## 🏗️ Work in Progress

**New Pull Requests**
*   **elizaos/eliza**
    *   [#6962](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6962): fix: clean discord chat UX — drop heartbeat + bump orchestrator pin
*   **elizaos-plugins/registry**
    *   [#345](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/345): Add @quantoracle/plugin-quantoracle

**Active Discussions**
*   **elizaos/eliza**
    *   [#6961](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6961): Merxex Integration: Enabling Agent-to-Agent Commerce. A new proposal to facilitate commerce between autonomous agents.

## 🐞 Issue Triage

**New Issues**
*   **elizaos/eliza**
    *   [#6961](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6961): Merxex Integration: Enabling Agent-to-Agent Commerce.
